articles.title: 5 things to know about Patriots first-round pick Caleb Lomu

articles.title: Eliot Wolf admits Patriots were surprised Caleb Lomu was still available before trade-up
articles.description:

articles.title: Patriots complete trade with Bills, move up in NFL Draft to select offensive tackle Caleb Lomu
articles.description:
The Patriots sent the 31st pick and the 125th pick (a fourth-rounder) to the AFC East rival Bills in exchange for the 28th pick.

articles.title: Sabres rally to beat Bruins 3-1, take 2-1 lead in playoff series
articles.description:
Jeremy Swayman made 25 saves, and Tanner Jeannot scored early in the second period for the Bruins as they opened the scoring for the third straight game.

articles.title: Red Sox swept by Yankees 4-2 as bullpen wastes Payton Tolle’s season debut
articles.description:
Cam Schlittler limited the team he rooted for growing up to four hits over eight innings, and the New York Yankees rallied twice to beat the Boston Red Sox 4-2 for a three-game sweep and a season-high six-game winning streak
